What is the Nyquist sampling theorem?: Sample rate must be ≥2x the max signal frequency
What is sensor drift?: Gradual change in readings over time without actual change
What advantage does a MEMS gyroscope pro: Measures angular velocity for rotation detection
What is the MQTT \"last will\" message u: Notify subscribers if a client disconnects unexpectedly
In LoRaWAN, what is an \"Adaptive Data R: Automatically optimizes data rate and power for each device
What is a retained message in MQTT?: Last message stored by broker, sent to new subscribers
What is the \"Spreading Factor\" in LoRa: Controls trade-off between range and data rate
What does \"fog computing\" refer to in: Processing data between edge and cloud
What is event sourcing?: Storing every state change as an immutable event
What does a message queue provide in an: Asynchronous decoupling of producers and consumers
What is the CAP theorem primarily about?: Trade-offs between Consistency, Availability, and Partition tolerance
What is the \"Kappa Architecture\" in Io: Single stream processing pipeline replacing Lambda batch layer
What is a \"data lake\" in IoT context?: Centralized repository for raw data in any format
What is \"backpressure\" in a streaming: Signal from consumer to producer to slow down data flow
What does a firewall do?: Filters network traffic based on rules
What is \"secure boot\" in IoT?: Verifying firmware integrity before execution using cryptographic signatures
What is the OWASP IoT Top 10?: List of most critical IoT security vulnerabilities
What is a \"side-channel attack\" on IoT: Extracting secrets by analyzing power consumption, timing, or EM emissions
What is two-factor authentication (2FA)?: Using two different verification methods for login
What is \"certificate pinning\" in IoT d: Hardcoding expected server certificate to prevent MITM
What is an \"edge gateway\" in IoT?: Device that bridges local sensors to the cloud
What is \"data windowing\" in edge strea: Grouping stream events by time or count for batch processing
What is the ESP32?: A low-cost WiFi/BLE microcontroller for IoT
What is \"model quantization\" in edge A: Reducing model precision (e.g., float32 to int8) for smaller/faster inference
What is \"edge orchestration\"?: Managing deployment and scaling of workloads across edge nodes
What is WASM (WebAssembly) used for at t: Running portable, sandboxed code on diverse edge hardware
What is Arduino?: An open-source electronics platform for prototyping
In a mesh network, how do devices commun: Each device can relay messages for others
What is a \"smart plug\"?: A WiFi-enabled power outlet for remote on/off control
What is \"geofencing\" in smart home aut: Triggering actions based on device location entering/leaving an area
What is \"Thread Border Router\" in smar: A device connecting Thread mesh to IP-based networks
What is \"scene\" in smart home automati: A predefined set of device states activated together
What is \"predictive maintenance\"?: Using data analytics to predict equipment failure before it happens
What is \"time-sensitive networking\" (T: IEEE 802.1 standards for deterministic real-time Ethernet communication
What is a \"digital twin\" in manufactur: Virtual replica of physical asset updated with real-time data
What is \"Overall Equipment Effectivenes: Performance metric combining Availability × Performance × Quality
What is Modbus?: A serial communication protocol for industrial electronic devices
What is a MAC address?: Unique hardware identifier for network interfaces
What is DHCP used for?: Automatically assigning IP addresses to devices
What is the purpose of NAT in IoT networ: Mapping private IP addresses to public ones
What is a VLAN?: Virtual Local Area Network for logical network segmentation
What is 6LoWPAN?: IPv6 over Low-Power Wireless Personal Area Networks
What is a subnet mask used for?: Defining the network and host portions of an IP address
What is \"MQTT-SN\" (MQTT for Sensor Net: MQTT variant for non-TCP/IP networks like Zigbee and BLE
What is port forwarding?: Redirecting network traffic from one port to another address/port
What is anomaly detection in IoT?: Identifying unusual patterns that deviate from expected behavior
What is \"transfer learning\" useful for: Applying a pre-trained model to a new but related task with less data
What is \"TinyML\"?: Running ML models on microcontrollers with minimal resources
What is a \"confusion matrix\" in ML?: Table showing true/false positives and negatives for classification
What is \"concept drift\" in IoT ML mode: Statistical properties of the target variable change over time
What is reinforcement learning used for: Optimizing control policies through trial and error
What is \"pruning\" in neural network op: Removing unnecessary weights/neurons to reduce model size
What is a dataset?: A collection of data used for training or testing
What is \"edge inference\"?: Running a trained ML model on an edge device
What does AWS IoT Core provide?: Managed cloud service for connecting IoT devices
What is a \"CI/CD pipeline\"?: Automated build, test, and deploy process
What is Azure IoT Hub?: Microsoft cloud service for bidirectional IoT device communication
What is \"infrastructure as code\" (IaC): Managing infrastructure through machine-readable definition files
What is \"the cloud\"?: Remote servers accessed over the internet for computing/storage
What is a \"serverless function\"?: Code executed on-demand without managing servers
What is \"Google Cloud IoT\" being repla: Partner solutions and Pub/Sub + Cloud Functions
What is \"time-series database\" used fo: Efficiently storing and querying timestamped data
What is \"device provisioning\" in IoT c: Automated registration and configuration of new devices at scale
What does API rate limiting do?: Restricts the number of API calls per time period
